SugarCRM: Project optimistic rendering

December 2015

rapid prototypingjscss

Rapidly prototype a SugarCRM list view immitating delayed load time while displaying a concept known as optimistic rendering. Repeat the same user experience when clicking a link to load more accounts into a list view.

Interactive prototype

Role: UX Engineer
